2606.00949.title: Explainable deep reinforcement learning reveals energy-efficient control strategies for turbulent drag reduction
2606.00949.paper_summary: We propose a method combining Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MARL) and eXplainable Deep Learning (XDL) to reduce drag in wall-bounded turbulent flows. Taking as a baseline the results of training agents directly targeting wall-shear stress and opposition control, three SHAP-guided approaches are compared. In the first, the reward is computed from SHAP attributions of a U-net predicting the future velocity field; in the second, from SHAP attributions of a U-net predicting the skin-friction coefficient; in the third, from a combination of SHAP attributions of two U-nets predicting the skin-friction coefficient and the wall pressure fluctuations, respectively. The combined SHAP strategy based on skin-friction coefficient and wall-pressure fluctuations achieves the best overall performance, achieving a DR of 34.44% and a NES of 34.01% with only 0.43% normalized input power. Relative to opposition control, drag reduction and net energy saving increase by 49.41% and 48.52%, respectively. Compared with the direct wall-shear-stress baseline, the proposed strategy simultaneously improves performance while reducing the normalized actuation cost from 5.90% to 0.43%. Analysis of the results reveals that the energetically efficient policy is consistent with pressure-gated actuation, activating predominantly at near-zero wall pressure, and operates on a temporal timescale comparable to the lifetime of the near-wall turbulent structures.
2606.00949.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種結合多智能體深度強化學習（MARL）和可解釋深度學習（XDL）的方法，以減少壁面約束的湍流流動中的阻力。以直接針對壁面剪切應力和對抗控制的訓練結果為基準，對三種基於SHAP的引導方法進行比較。在第一種方法中，獎勵是根據預測未來速度場的U-net的SHAP歸因計算的；在第二種方法中，獎勵來自預測皮膚摩擦係數的U-net的SHAP歸因；在第三種方法中，獎勵來自兩個U-net的SHAP歸因的組合，分別預測皮膚摩擦係數和壁面壓力波動。基於皮膚摩擦係數和壁面壓力波動的綜合SHAP策略實現了最佳的整體性能，達到34.44%的阻力減少率（DR）和34.01%的淨能量節省（NES），而僅需0.43%的歸一化輸入功率。相對於對抗控制，阻力減少和淨能量節省分別增加了49.41%和48.52%。與直接的壁面剪切應力基準相比，所提出的策略同時改善了性能，同時將歸一化驅動成本從5.90%降低至0.43%。結果分析顯示，能量高效的策略與壓力閥驅動一致，主要在接近零壁面壓力時啟動，並在與近壁湍流結構的壽命相當的時間尺度上運作。
2606.00949.author: Federica Tonti et.al.
